basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rishikesh Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh) Research Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 12 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Rishikesh Research Associate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate preferably in science, One year of human clinical research experience, Valid good clinical practice certificate
qualification.details: Graduate preferably in science with one year of human clinical research experience and valid good clinical practice certificate. Desirable: Experience in coordinating regulatory clinical trial and Certification of Computer/IT knowledge and training.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Rishikesh Research Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Rishikesh Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 22nd June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates should be graduates, preferably in science, with at least one year of experience in human clinical research and a valid good clinical practice certificate.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The age limit for this post is between 21 years and 35 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules, though none are explicitly mentioned in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate position will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month for the contractual period.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed term as specified by AIIMS Rishikesh.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be sent with the application?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Where should the application be sent?
faq.answer: The application should be sent via email to the official email address provided in the notification. Ensure the post applied for is clearly mentioned in the subject line.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of AIIMS Rishikesh?
faq.answer: The official website of All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh is https://www.aiimsrishikesh.edu.in. You can visit this site for more information and updates.
